title: ANG3LICXL's Simplistic ModPack
description: A simplistic survival modpack. No big mods except for biomes o' plenty.
body:
### A simplistic vanilla (ish) modpack

================================================================================

### Main Mods ->
Biomes O' Plenty | Adds multiple different biomes to the game.

Serene Seasons | Adds seasons to the game.

Tough As Nails | Adds thirst tempature to the game.

Serene Seasons | Adds seasons to the game.

Fallings Treets/Veinminer | Mine a vein of ore/a tree and it'll all break down at once.

Tectonic | Adds an advanced world generation.
